[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2017-08-25
[TITLE]: Aldi praised for allowing 'Muslim' checkout worker not to sell alcohol on a till after 'raising concerns'
[METADATA/INTRO]: SUPERMARKET giant Aldi has been praised after a checkout worker “raised concerns” about selling alcohol at their till. The sign at the end of one of the conveyor belts in the Northampton store stated: “No alcohol is able to be...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: SUPERMARKET giant Aldi has been praised after a checkout worker “raised concerns” about selling alcohol at their till. 
 The sign at the end of one of the conveyor belts in the Northampton store stated: “No alcohol is able to be served on this till. Sorry for any inconvenience.” 
 Customers looking to buy beer, wine or spirits instead had to queue at one of the other checkouts instead. 
 A picture of the till was posted online where it received a mixed reaction on social media, with dozens praising Aldi for its handling on the situation. 
 One user wrote: “Well done @Aldi for looking after religious concerns by not compelling a Muslim cashier to serve alcohol as part of his job.”

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Stop and Shop Pulls Deli Meats During Listeria Scare
[METADATA/INTRO]: Stop and Shop Pulls Deli Meats From Shelves Shoppers at SouthCoast Stop and Shops may have noticed something odd on Friday afternoon. The supermarket's deli cases were stripped empty. Workers at the Fairhaven Stop and Shop were working hard to...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Stop and Shop Pulls Deli Meats From Shelves 
 Shoppers at SouthCoast Stop and Shops may have noticed something odd on Friday afternoon. The supermarket's deli cases were stripped empty. Workers at the Fairhaven Stop and Shop were working hard to wipe down all of the deli's surfaces as word of a listeria issue circulated. 
 The store manager on duty at the Stop and Shop in Fairhaven made it a point to let shoppers know nothing in the Fairhaven store has been contaminated. "We have not had an outbreak here. It is throughout the country. It is not in Fairhaven or anywhere near here."

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2021-07-31
[TITLE]: Aldi customers debate 'selfish' hack to slow down those lightning-fast till staff - Gloucestershire Live
[METADATA/INTRO]: Aldi customers debate 'selfish' hack to slow down those lightning-fast till staff "In your face, Aldi!"...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: "People like you packing their bag at the register is so annoying and selfish. Try packing at the bench like everyone else,” said one shopper. 
 Another added, with a degree of emotion that appeared a bit over the top: "I despise when people do this." 
 But there could be a second hack among Aldi till staff, designed to sort of negate this little trick. 
 A couple of till staff on the Aldi Facebook group let on that they have a way to counter such shenanigans. 
 “I have customers do this,” said one member of staff. “I just put my arm up to move the belt, let it all build up then start scanning,” she added.
